name: McCormick & Priore
message: McCormick & Priore is a defense litigation firm known for having the intensity and integrity to go beyond expectations - something we call "outperformance. This includes being large enough to provide the in-depth legal expertise and support clients need and yet focused enough to also provide the individualized attention successful litigation requiresWe present to your attention a large collection of SQL databases, confidential data of employees and clients.
